name: Style information for Anchr.

---

is shown in the upper left corner of the HTML.

- These are the colors:
```
{
    --color-bg-default: var(--color-gray-100);
    --color-green-500: #66de80;
    --color-green-500-hover: #4fbb66;
    --color-green-700: #003523;
    --color-green-700-hover: #002116;
    --color-green-800: #002116;
    --color-orange-500: #e8674a;
    --color-orange-500-hover: #dc4725;
    --color-purple-500: #502440;
    --color-purple-500-hover: #451634;
    --color-pink-500: #f1d0f4;
    --color-pink-500-hover: #d091d6;
    --color-succes-100: #d9f2e3;
    --color-succes-500: #00a841;
    --color-succes-900: #00240e;
    --color-warning-100: #fcf1cf;
    --color-warning-500: #f2c84a;
    --color-warning-900: #332600;
}
```

- And the font:

```
{
    font-family: __FiraSansFont_05fa3e;
    src: url(/_next/static/media/414ab5e6f405f3a5-s.p.woff2) format("woff2");
    font-display: swap;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: normal;
}
```
